settings.teams.as_an_admin_you_can_choos.en: As an admin, you can choose whether to enable or disable the ability for team members to invite others by invitation link.
settings.teams.as_an_admin_you_can_choos.zh: 作为管理员，您可以选择是否允许团队成员通过邀请链接邀请他人。

settings.teams.email_invitations_are_val.en: Email invitations are valid for 7 days.
settings.teams.email_invitations_are_val.zh: 邮件邀请有效期为 7 天。

settings.teams.when_you_create_a_team_yo.en: When you create a team, you can collaborate on agent-driven development by sharing cloud agent runs, environments, automations, and artifacts. You can also create a shared knowledge store for teammates and agents alike.
settings.teams.when_you_create_a_team_yo.zh: 创建团队后，您可以通过共享云代理运行、环境、自动化和成果进行协作开发，并为团队成员和代理创建共享知识库。
